error_signature: input values not binding in repeating rows
title: Input values not binding in repeating Rows
symptom: When trying to bind text inputs inside a repeating row, the inputs do not appear in the variable list, and values cannot be stored.
applies_when: Using a Form Container inside a repeating Rows element
Trying to bind input values to variables
not_this_if: Inputs are outside of a repeating context
Using static inputs not within a repeating group
root_cause: WeWeb loses the state of inputs when they are placed inside a repeating group, which prevents the inputs from being recognized and bound to variables correctly.
fix_steps: Select each input inside the Form Container
Set up 'On changed' actions for each input to manually save their values to a variable
agent_instruction: Use 'On changed' actions for inputs in the repeating Rows to save their values to variables.
